title: Spectral Creation
description: A cozy lightweight modpack exploring Spectrum and Create. Handcrafted progression with custom quests designed to encourage realistic exploration while maintaining a vanilla feel. Highly optimized for good performance.
body:
# Spectral Creation

### Overview
A unique experience designed to encourage exploration with custom progression tied to Spectrum and Create while still maintaining the vanilla feel.

### Quests
A handcrafted quest book guides you through the various mods, complemented by Spectrum's massive lore-based quest book and Create's detailed advancement tree.

### Design Philosophy
- Game progression that is tightly integrated with both modded and vanilla content
- Encourage exploration of both the world and obscure game mechanics
- Purposely select mods to avoid overlapping features and for optimized performance 

### Issues
If you encounter issues with the quest book or other custom content designed for this modpack report them [here](https://codeberg.org/mules/modpacks)

### Other Packs
If you're interested in other modpacks I've made checkout my modrinth profile [here](https://modrinth.com/user/Mules)
